title: Upcoming things on Plate
html:
September 2020 senior-year Yahir todo dump: QuestBridge, Sellinger, October scholarships, tests Tuesday, school, AP Stats Test Friday, pizza meeting for cards, "book ventures." Captured the same week the college application arc heated up.

TL;DR

  • Concrete senior-year parallel-tracking: scholarships (QuestBridge, Sellinger), AP testing, school, business side ("book ventures" likely the mybookstore thread).
  • Same fear-of-not-doing parallelism that recurs across 2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist and 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream.
  • Anchors the September-2020 timestamp for the QuestBridge application push.

yahir gonzalez · questbridge · college application arc · mybookstore · fear of not doing
